issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for asset execution and resource usage.
Hardcoded database credentials in DatabaseResource connection_string expose sensitive information.

scenarios.name: define-analytics-asset-with-resource
scenarios.rationale: Response B partially meets the rubric but fails to name the asset correctly and omit logging, whereas Response A does not meet any of the rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: create-daily-schedule-and-sensor
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers the required schedule and sensor structure but omits logging the number of new files, while Response B does not meet the Dagster-specific requirements at all.
